name: golang-mongodb-mongo-driver-dev
title: golang-mongodb-mongo-driver-dev
description:
MongoDB official driver for Go
The MongoDB Go official driver implements the API necessary to interface
with MongoDB servers.
.
It support wire protocol compression using Snappy, zLib, or zstd.
.
MongoDB 2.6 and higher is required.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-mongodb-mongo-driver-dev because MongoDB official driver for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-mongodb-mongo-driver-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-mongodb-mongo-driver-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-mongodb-mongo-driver-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
